title: Display cover of card right or left

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am using the Card view fresquence, I found the need to request option that let me set Cover position in the right or left side, currently when we select people column as cover of the card, the image shown in center, leaving both sides as white space.
Would be more efficient to use the space, if we can set that cover show in right side, then another side can be used to display more information as part of the card.
